news.title: Ford Finally Runs Out of EVs
news.summary: Ford’s (NYSE: F) sales of its two flagship EVs dropped to nearly zero in May. Originally, each was to sell hundreds of thousands a year. Sales of the Mustang Mach-E dropped to 2,467, down 44% from the year before. That is 82 per day nationwide. Ford thought that using the Mustang brand would help jump-start ... Ford Finally Runs Out of EVs
